title: App Settings - General - Account - Invite sent, user logs during the installation, not registered on Cloud
scenario: IT admin invite persists in Poly Studio Mobile app Account screen for unregistered mobile user who never accepted invite via external source
steps: 1. Install Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. During onboarding, log in with the mobile user account that was invited by an IT admin to a tenant.
5. Tap the Account icon or navigate to General → Account.
7. Check whether Tenant ID and Tenant Name rows are displayed on the account card.
8. Verify the cloud registration status of the mobile user.
9. Check if the invite to the tenant is still shown in the app.
expected: The mobile user should be fully registered on the cloud with Tenant ID and Tenant Name rows present on the account card. The invite to the tenant should not be shown after login, or should be properly handled based on the user's registration status.
